context.---REQUIRED BEFORE FIRST DEPLOY---: Set existingOriginDomain below. Bootstrap with: cdk bootstrap aws://ACCOUNT/eu-central-1
context.---SSM SECRETS---: Managed automatically by GitHub Actions deploy workflow — set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and ALPHA_ACCESS_KEY as GitHub repository secrets
context.---ACM CERT NOTE---: certificateArn points to a us-east-1 certificate (CloudFront requirement), even though everything else is in eu-central-1
